release_notes: Startup perf: lazy-load heavy pages and modals. SettingsPage, ProxiesPage, AboutPage, ProfileEditor, CommandPalette and PreLaunchModal are now React.lazy() chunks. None renders at first paint, so they're shipped as separate JS chunks loaded on demand. Savings show up at renderer cold start — AboutDashboard alone pulls in BackupSection + AutomationSection + UpdatesSection (DB + network calls) that used to load eagerly. First navigation to Settings/About has a brief one-shot chunk-load (~100-200ms), then cached for the session.
